prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: EVR-GRIPTAPEBP-ODGRNNVY-AMZ
Product Type: BACKPACK
Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor
Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 3 Pocket Navy Blue and Green Backpack Hiking Gear Camping Supplies, 19L
Description: This day pack or hiking backpack is constructed of durable 600D water resistant polyester, so you can count on it to protect belongings when hiking, camping, traveling, road tripping and more. The backpack measures 17 x 12 x 6.5 inches and has a carrying capacity of up to 19 liters, making it a great backpack that can easily hold your essentials and personal belongings. The backpack features dual zippered front pockets and padded adjustable shoulder straps for custom comfort, and the dual hook and loop front straps can hold additional outdoor gear in place without taking up interior space. Features a lightweight design and comes in classic two tone navy blue and green dual colorway.
Search Terms: hiking backpack outdoor gear camping supplies day pack adventure travel essentials back to school
Features:
- DAY PACK: Made of water Resistant 600D polyester, making it great for day hikes, weekend camping trips and more; features a classic navy blue and olive green two tone color design and leather ASR Outdoor patch
- ADJUSTABLE DESIGN: Easily adjustable padded shoulder straps for custom fit and comfort when you're adventures take you
- AMPLE STORAGE: This ASR Outdoor backpack has a carrying capacity of 19 liters, providing ample space to hold outdoor gear, water bottle, personal belongings and more
- DUAL FRONT VELCRO STRAPS: Built in dual front Velcro straps to carry additional outdoor gear like a camping mat, yoga mat, towel and more
- 3 POCKET BACKPACK: This backpack features one large main compartment with interior sleeve, as well as two easily accessible large front zip pockets

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters.  Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available.

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 19L Navy Blue Green Hiking Backpack

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 19L Navy Blue And Green Backpack

anthropic.title_differentiation: Water Resistant 600D Polyester, 3 Pockets, Adjustable Straps, Dual Front Velcro Straps, Day Pack

openai.title_differentiation: Water Resistant 600D Polyester, Padded Adjustable Shoulder Straps, Dual Front Hook And Loop Straps, Interior Sleeve
